title: koeleria arenaria
intro: Koeleria arenaria, also known as June grass or small June grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is native to Europe and Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and wounds, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Koeleria arenaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies and folk medicine.
